title: calamagrostis cabrerae var. aristulata
intro: Calamagrostis cabrerae var. aristulata, also known as Aristulata, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aristulata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Aristulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
